title: Climate Anxiety
text: Climate anxiety is distress, worry, or unease about climate change and ecological loss. It can feel like dread about a warming future.

title: Bat
text: A bat is a mammal. Bats are vertebrates and many bats use wings for powered flight and echolocation for navigation.

title: Photosynthesis
text: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants and some organisms convert light energy into chemical energy such as sugars.

title: Bat And Vertebrate Bridge
text: The bridge connecting bat and vertebrate is mammal: bat is a mammal, and mammal is a class of vertebrate.
